evidence_from_trajectory: Training trajectories for Bandit-v0 included sub-solved reward or invalid moves.
gradient_text: The agent needs an environment-specific repair rule for Bandit-v0.
suggested_edit: Add a rule: For Bandit, explore every button once, track empirical reward, then exploit the best observed button.

gradient_text: The agent needs an environment-specific repair rule for ConnectFour-v0.
suggested_edit: Add a rule: For Connect Four, take an immediate winning column and otherwise block an opponent immediate connect-four.
